question_text: INSTRUCTIONS — Delete every row whose question_type starts with # before importing.
One question per row. Leave unused columns empty for that question type.
COLUMN: question_type — MULTIPLE_CHOICE | MULTIPLE_SELECT | FREE_RESPONSE | SLIDER | MATCHING
COLUMN: option_a … option_d — MC / multi-select answer choices
COLUMN: correct_options — Single letter (D) or pipe-separated (A|C) for multi-select
COLUMN: slider_min, slider_max, slider_correct, slider_tolerance — SLIDER only
COLUMN: matching_pairs — MATCHING only. Format: "Left1:Right1;Left2:Right2" (min 2 pairs)
COLUMN: free_response_max_length — FREE_RESPONSE only. Optional max characters
EXAMPLES BELOW — Copy and edit, or replace with your own questions
